n: Book 4, Chapter 2: Land of the Stag

steps.t: Braigiar will speak with you again just across the border of Enedwaith and Dunland, at Dúvispont, in Trum Dreng.
Braigiar is waiting to speak with you just outside Lhan Tarren, the village of the Stag-clan. You should speak with Braigiar before proceeding.
